subcodes.first_line: O thou dear handmaid of God! Thy letter hath been received and its contents noted. Thou didst ask for a rule whereby to guide thy life.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه ات ملاحظه گردید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل شد دستورالعمل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @the power of words; of speech, @importance of prayer, @effort; striving, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
